title: heterocoma lanuginosa
intro: Heterocoma lanuginosa, also known as woolly heterocoma, is a plant species native to South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Heterocoma lanuginosa include relieving pain, reducing fever, and treating respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
